title: Delinquent
summary:
Delinquent may refer to:Delinquent (royalist), Royalists whose estates had been seized during the English Civil War
A juvenile delinquent, often shortened as delinquent, a young person who fails to do that which is required by law
extract:
Delinquent may refer to:

Delinquent (royalist), Royalists whose estates had been seized during the English Civil War
A juvenile delinquent, often shortened as delinquent, a young person (under 18) who  fails to do that which is required by law
